name: Dolmathes (Stuffed Grape Leaves)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place meat into a large bowl and add diced onion (sauteed if desired), salt, pepper, dill weed, cumin, and oil. Mix well.
2. Add rice and 1 cup of water. Mix by hand until blended together.
3. Place about 1 tablespoon of mixture in the center of washed leaf (ribs up) and roll into a narrow roll.
4. Place rolls into a deep saucepan in layers.
5. Add chicken broth. Cover and simmer for about 45 minutes over low heat until rice is done.
6. Serve plain, with wedges of lemon or with egg-lemon sauce.
